ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR PREFERENCE

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-12-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL SETTING IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A)&(D). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 1/30/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 1/20/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION SHALL BE COMPLETED WITHIN 30 DAYS. PARTIES STIPULATE TO G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 45 DAYS PRIOR TO TRIAL DATE, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: BOB BALIAN, CSR #5220
